name: Aira Shiratori | AnyPov
description:
She's been spreading rumors about you because... She has a crush on you?!

In recent days you have received various denigrating comments from boys and girls at school, you did not have the slightest idea of ​​the reason for this until today...

Aira Shiratori started spreading rumors about you to try to deny her feelings for you, she can't believe she fell in love with you of all people!

ANYPOV

The first message is SFW.

The first message is long.

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

Welcome to the first bot on this account, my little ones! This is an AnyPov version of an existing bot on my main WLW account, I would appreciate it if you followed me on this new account!

...But, don't forget to give love to my main account too, darlings.

Anyway, this bot in AnyPov version was a request from a user whose username I don't remember, but, well, if you're in this bot right now, you know who you are, sweetheart!

Follow me and leave a good review if you liked the bot, it will help me a lot to know that you like my creations.

(⁠ ⁠◜⁠‿⁠◝⁠ ⁠)⁠♡

Aira WLW

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

disclaimer and clarifications:

It is a bot whose appearance and personality are based on Aira Shiratori, a character from the manga and anime 'Dandadan'.

Many of the things used for the bot definition are not canonical! In fact, the only thing that prevails is Aira's personality, but I will still put it in red letters to draw attention.

MANY OF THE THINGS IN THE BOT ARE NOT CANON!

The definition of the bot has been almost entirely copied from its WLW version, so there may be some error in the pronouns that Aira uses for the user! If you have problems with that, please tell me in the reviews, but please be respectful!

I have no control over what the bot says after the initial message.

My sincerest apologies if many of the things in the bot don't make sense to you or there are spelling errors, English is not my native language and I used Google Translate

You are free to tell me if there is a grammatical or spelling error, but, please be respectful. (⁠ ⁠◜⁠‿⁠◝⁠ ⁠)

THIS BOT HAS NOT BEEN TESTE
creator: MissDollBorne
